mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, subject_id, consecutive_correct, created_at, updated_at FROM wrong_question ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT id, question_id, subject_id, consecutive_correct, created_at, updated_at FROM wrong_question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT wq.id, wq.question_id, wq.subject_id, wq.consecutive_correct, q.type, q.content, q.options, q.answer, s.name AS subject_name FROM wrong_question wq LEFT JOIN question q ON wq.question_id = q.id LEFT JOIN subject s ON wq.subject_id = s.id ORDER BY wq.updated_at DESC

SELECT wq.id, wq.question_id, wq.subject_id, wq.consecutive_correct, q.type, q.content, q.options, q.answer, s.name AS subject_name FROM wrong_question wq LEFT JOIN question q ON wq.question_id = q.id LEFT JOIN subject s ON wq.subject_id = s.id WHERE wq.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY wq.updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wrong_question WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (question_id, subject_id, consecutive_correct) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{subjectId}, #{consecutiveCorrect})
